name: init_hub
description: Create a `.bridgememory/` folder at `rootPath` with an index.json and a welcome memory. Idempotent — safe to call on an existing hub. Use ONLY when the user has explicitly asked to set up BridgeMemory for a directory.

rootPath.description: Absolute path to the directory that should become a hub root. The .bridgememory/ folder will be created inside it.
